---
title: "ITensor"
format: html
engine: julia
execute:
  daemon: false
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=@."]
---

# MPO

```{julia}
using RandomMeas
@doc MPO
````

```{julia}
os = OpSum()
os += "Sz", 1, "Sz", 2
os += "Sz", 2, "Sz", 3
os += "Sz", 3, "Sz", 4
sites = siteinds("S=1/2", 4)
H = MPO(os, sites)
```
